namespace PolyType.SourceGenerator
{
    internal sealed partial class TypeShapeProvider_TestAssembly
    {
        /// <summary>Gets a generated shape for the specified type.</summary>
        #nullable disable annotations // Use nullable-oblivious property type
        public global::PolyType.ITypeShape<double> Double => __Double ?? __Init_Singleton(ref __Double, __Create_Double());
        #nullable enable annotations // Use nullable-oblivious property type
        private global::PolyType.ITypeShape<double>? __Double;

        private global::PolyType.ITypeShape<double> __Create_Double()
        {
            return new global::PolyType.SourceGenModel.SourceGenObjectTypeShape<double>
            {
                Provider = this,
            };
        }
    }
